subject: ess
title: 18N.1.SL.TZ0.1
question_html:
The resource booklet provides information on Algonquin Provincial Park in Canada. Use the resource booklet and your own studies to answer the following.

Identify one ecosystem in Algonquin Provincial Park.
solution_html:
This question requires “Resource Booklet - Nov 2018 SL paper 1”, available under the "your tests" tab > supplemental materials.

Possible ecosystems include:
deciduous forest/maple forest/beech forest/temperate forest;
coniferous forest/boreal forest/taiga forest/spruce forest/pine forest;
lake;
river/stream;
meadow / beaver meadow;
marsh / beaver marsh;
pond / beaver pond;
wetlands.

Do not accept forest/wood as too general.
Do not accept biomes eg “taiga/tundra biome” or only “taiga”.
examiners_html: The majority of candidates correctly identified an ecosystem present within Algonquin Provincial Park. Incorrect responses included naming a biome e.g. tundra or giving generic responses such as ‘forest’.
